name: 10-Year Limitation Period for Foreign Tax Credits

eligibility.description: Available to taxpayers who pay or accrue foreign taxes and seek a credit under section 901 or applicable treaties.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Extends the period to file a claim for credit or refund to 10 years from the return due date if the overpayment is attributable to foreign taxes paid or accrued.
